query: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND (table_name LIKE '%Email%' OR table_name LIKE '%Recap%' OR table_name LIKE '%nightly%' OR table_name LIKE '%scheduled%' OR table_name LIKE '%Brief%' OR table_name LIKE '%digest%' OR table_name LIKE '%Sync%' OR table_name LIKE '%LessonGen%' OR table_name LIKE '%powerSchool%' OR table_name LIKE '%ical%' OR table_name LIKE '%drivePush%' OR table_name LIKE '%recap%') ORDER BY table_name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND (table_name LIKE '%Email%' OR table_name LIKE '%Recap%' OR table_name LIKE '%nightly%' OR table_name LIKE '%scheduled%' OR table_name LIKE '%Brief%' OR table_name LIKE '%digest%' OR table_name LIKE '%Sync%' OR table_name LIKE '%LessonGen%' OR table_name LIKE '%powerSchool%' OR table_name LIKE '%ical%' OR table_name LIKE '%drivePush%' OR table_name LIKE '%recap%') ORDER BY table_name;
